one_time_description: Revenue from West Fraser Timber Mills ($1,598,955) and Adjustment of Silviculture Responsibility Liability ($250,000) appear to be non-recurring items; also Impairment Loss of $101,000
economic_notes: Nation has three business entities: Red Bluff Developments, RBDC Trucking LLP, and Lhtako Gas and Convenience. Revenue from Barkerville Gold Mines ($438,362) and West Fraser Timber Mills ($1,598,955) indicate resource sector activity. Nation also received revenue from StarWest Petroleum ($78,450).
notes: Significant year with large revenue increase from ~$2.66M to ~$9.07M driven by West Fraser Timber Mills revenue ($1.6M), large Other Revenue ($1.2M), and substantial ISC funding increase. Restatement of prior year accumulated surplus of ($948,943) noted (Note 23). Nation owns investments in business entities recorded at negative value (-$1,207,248) indicating cumulative losses. Impairment loss of $101,000 recorded. Tangible capital assets increased significantly from $4.88M to $8.80M with $4.12M in acquisitions. Bank advances on housing construction of $578,274 in 2021 vs nil in 2020.
